plants? (Pg. 72, E)

33. Choose the incorrect statement about
Mendel’s monohybrid cross. (Pg. 73, E)
A) The recessive parental trait is
expressed without any blending in F»
generation.
B) The alleles of parental pair segregate
from each other and both alleles are
transmitted to a gamete.
C) The segregation of alleles is a random
process.
D) There is a 50% chance of a gamete
containing either allele.
34. The production of gametes by the parents
the formation of zygotes, the F1 and F2
plants, can be understood by using (Pg.
73, E)
A) Wenn diagram
B) Pie diagram
C) A pyramid diagram
D) Punnett square
35. Select the correct statement. (Pg. 73, E)
A) Franklin Stahl coined the term
‘linkage’.
